LAW AND MOTION 301, NOT OF MOT AND MOT FOR CHANGE OF VENUE OF DEF. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT CAROL NOBIS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED -- DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH ITS BURDEN THAT S. F. IS AN IMPROPER VENUE. CROSS MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

* A R G U E D and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant CAROL NOBIS' motion for change of venue is DENIED -- defendant fails to establish its burden that S. F. is an improper venue. Cross motion for sanctions is DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301/MD) Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
